```python
import scanpy as sc
import squidpy as sq
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from scipy import stats
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Set up scanpy settings
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=80, facecolor='white')

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/mouse_brain/mouse_brain.h5ad')
adata.var_names_make_unique()

print("=== SPATIAL TRANSCRIPTOMICS DATA ANALYSIS ===")
print(f"Data shape: {adata.shape}")
print(f"Observations (cells): {adata.n_obs}")
print(f"Variables (genes): {adata.n_vars}")

# Basic data information
print(f"\nMetadata columns: {list(adata.obs.columns)}")
print(f"Unique brain sections: {adata.obs['brain_section_label'].nunique()}")
print(f"Unique cell types: {adata.obs['celltype'].nunique()}")

# Check spatial coordinates
if 'spatial' in adata.obsm:
    spatial_coords = adata.obsm['spatial']
    print("Spatial coordinates found in adata.obsm['spatial']")
else:
    spatial_coords = adata.obs[['x', 'y']].values
    adata.obsm['spatial'] = spatial_coords
    print("Spatial coordinates extracted from adata.obs['x', 'y']")

# 1. BASIC PREPROCESSING AND QC
print("\n=== 1. BASIC PREPROCESSING AND QC ===")

# Calculate QC metrics
adata.var['mt'] = adata.var_names.str.startswith('mt-')
adata.var['ribo'] = adata.var_names.str.startswith(('Rps', 'Rpl'))
sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics(adata, percent_top=None, log1p=False, inplace=True)

print(f"Median genes per cell: {np.median(adata.obs['n_genes_by_counts']):.0f}")
print(f"Median UMI per cell: {np.median(adata.obs['total_counts']):.0f}")
print(f"Mitochondrial genes: {adata.var['mt'].sum()}")
print(f"Ribosomal genes: {adata.var['ribo'].sum()}")

# 2. SPATIAL VISUALIZATION
print("\n=== 2. SPATIAL VISUALIZATION ===")

# Plot spatial distribution by brain section
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15, 6))

# Spatial plot colored by brain section
sc.pl.embedding(adata, basis='spatial', color='brain_section_label', 
                ax=axes[0], show=False, frameon=False, 
                title='Brain Sections')

# Spatial plot colored by cell type
sc.pl.embedding(adata, basis='spatial', color='celltype', 
                ax=axes[1], show=False, frameon=False,
                title='Cell Types', legend_loc='on data',
                legend_fontsize=6)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/spatial_overview.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# 3. GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
print("\n=== 3. GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS ===")

# Normalize and log transform
adata.raw = adata
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4)
sc.pp.log1p(adata)

# Find highly variable genes
sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata, min_mean=0.0125, max_mean=3, min_disp=0.5)
print(f"Highly variable genes: {adata.var['highly_variable'].sum()}")

# Save full data and filter to HVGs for downstream analysis
adata_full = adata.copy()
adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable]

# 4. DIMENSIONALITY REDUCTION AND CLUSTERING
print("\n=== 4. DIMENSIONALITY REDUCTION AND CLUSTERING ===")

# PCA
sc.tl.pca(adata, svd_solver='arpack')
sc.pl.pca_variance_ratio(adata, log=True, n_top_pcs=50, show=False)
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/pca_variance.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# Neighborhood graph
sc.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=10, n_pcs=40)

# UMAP
sc.tl.umap(adata)

# Leiden clustering
sc.tl.leiden(adata, resolution=0.5, key_added='leiden_clusters')
print(f"Number of Leiden clusters: {adata.obs['leiden_clusters'].nunique()}")

# Visualize UMAP
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(12, 10))
sc.pl.umap(adata, color='celltype', ax=axes[0,0], show=False, frameon=False,
           title='Original Cell Types', legend_fontsize=8)
sc.pl.umap(adata, color='leiden_clusters', ax=axes[0,1], show=False, frameon=False,
           title='Leiden Clusters', legend_fontsize=8)
sc.pl.umap(adata, color='brain_section_label', ax=axes[1,0], show=False, frameon=False,
           title='Brain Sections', legend_fontsize=8)
sc.pl.umap(adata, color='total_counts', ax=axes[1,1], show=False, frameon=False,
           title='Total UMI Counts')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/umap_analysis.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# 5. SPATIAL STATISTICS
print("\n=== 5. SPATIAL STATISTICS ===")

# Spatial autocorrelation (Moran's I) for selected genes
# Select top variable genes for spatial analysis
top_genes = adata.var.sort_values('dispersions_norm', ascending=False).index[:100]

# Calculate spatial weights
sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type='generic', delaunay=True)

# Calculate Moran's I for top genes
sq.gr.spatial_autocorr(adata, genes=top_genes[:50], mode='moran')

# Get spatially variable genes
spatial_genes = adata.uns['moranI'].sort_values('I', ascending=False).head(10)
print("Top 10 spatially variable genes:")
print(spatial_genes[['I', 'pval_adj']].round(4))

# 6. CELL TYPE ANALYSIS
print("\n=== 6. CELL TYPE ANALYSIS ===")

# Cell type composition by brain section
celltype_composition = pd.crosstab(adata.obs['brain_section_label'], 
                                  adata.obs['celltype'], normalize='index')
print("\nCell type composition by brain section:")
print(celltype_composition.round(3))

# Find marker genes for cell types
sc.tl.rank_genes_groups(adata, 'celltype', method='wilcoxon')

# Create marker gene heatmap
sc.pl.rank_genes_groups_heatmap(adata, n_genes=3, show_gene_labels=True, 
                                show=False, figsize=(12, 8))
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/celltype_markers.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# 7. SPATIAL CELL TYPE DISTRIBUTION
print("\n=== 7. SPATIAL CELL TYPE DISTRIBUTION ===")

# Calculate neighborhood enrichment
sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='celltype')

# Plot neighborhood enrichment
sq.pl.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='celltype', figsize=(8, 6), show=False)
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/neighborhood_enrichment.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# 8. SPATIAL GENE EXPRESSION PATTERNS
print("\n=== 8. SPATIAL GENE EXPRESSION PATTERNS ===")

# Plot top spatially variable genes
top_spatial_genes = spatial_genes.index[:6]
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(15, 10))
axes = axes.flatten()

for i, gene in enumerate(top_spatial_genes):
    if gene in adata_full.var_names:
        sc.pl.embedding(adata_full, basis='spatial', color=gene, 
                       ax=axes[i], show=False, frameon=False,
                       title=f'{gene} (Moran\'s I: {spatial_genes.loc[gene, "I"]:.3f})')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/spatial_gene_expression.png', 
            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.close()

# 9. SUMMARY STATISTICS
print("\n=== 9. SUMMARY STATISTICS ===")

# Calculate statistics by cell type
celltype_stats = adata.obs.groupby('celltype').agg({
    'total_counts': ['mean', 'std'],
    'n_genes_by_counts': ['mean', 'std']
}).round(2)

print("Statistics by cell type:")
print(celltype_stats)

# Spatial clustering metrics
from sklearn.metrics import adjusted_rand_score, normalized_mutual_info_score

# Compare original cell types with Leiden clusters
ari = adjusted_rand_score(adata.obs['celltype'], adata.obs['leiden_clusters'])
nmi = normalized_mutual_info_score(adata.obs['celltype'], adata.obs['leiden_clusters'])

print(f"\nClustering validation:")
print(f"Adjusted Rand Index: {ari:.3f}")
print(f"Normalized Mutual Information: {nmi:.3f}")

# Add analysis results to adata
adata.uns['analysis_summary'] = {
    'n_hvgs': adata.var['highly_variable'].sum(),
    'n_leiden_clusters': adata.obs['leiden_clusters'].nunique(),
    'clustering_ari': ari,
    'clustering_nmi': nmi,
    'top_spatial_genes': spatial_genes.index.tolist(),
    'celltype_composition': celltype_composition.to_dict()
}

# Restore full gene set for saving
adata_result = adata_full.copy()
adata_result.obs = adata.obs.copy()
adata_result.obsm = adata.obsm.copy()
adata_result.uns = adata.uns.copy()

# Save results
adata_result.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q29/run_0/output.h5ad')

print("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===")
print(f"Results saved to output.h5ad")
print(f"Generated visualizations:")
print("- spatial_overview.png: Spatial distribution by brain section and cell type")
print("- pca_variance.png: PCA variance explained")
print("- umap_analysis.png: UMAP embeddings with various annotations")
print("- celltype_markers.png: Cell type marker gene heatmap")
print("- neighborhood_enrichment.png: Spatial neighborhood enrichment analysis")
print("- spatial_gene_expression.png: Top spatially variable genes")

print(f"\nKey findings:")
print(f"- Dataset contains {adata_result.n_obs:,} cells and {adata_result.n_vars:,} genes")
print(f"- {adata_result.obs['celltype'].nunique()} distinct cell types across {adata_result.obs['brain_section_label'].nunique()} brain sections")
print(f"- {len(spatial_genes)} spatially variable genes identified")
print(f"- Clustering achieved ARI={ari:.3f} and NMI={nmi:.3f} with original cell type annotations")
print(f"- Median {np.median(adata_result.obs['n_genes_by_counts']):.0f} genes and {np.median(adata_result.obs['total_counts']):.0f} UMIs per cell")
```
